functions.name: Missing fs/promises import
functions.description: Import async functions from 'fs/promises' instead of 'fs'. The 'fs' module exports callback-based functions, not promises.

recommendation.title: Use fs/promises for async file operations
recommendation.description: Import async functions from 'fs/promises' instead of 'fs'. The 'fs' module exports callback-based functions, not promises.

action.message: Using callback-based fs functions - import from 'fs/promises' for async/await support

functions.name: Synchronous fs in async function
functions.description: Synchronous fs operations (readFileSync, writeFileSync, etc.) block the event loop. Use async versions from fs/promises.

recommendation.title: Use async fs functions in async contexts
recommendation.description: Synchronous fs operations (readFileSync, writeFileSync, etc.) block the event loop. Use async versions from fs/promises.

action.message: Synchronous fs operation in async function - use fs/promises instead
